title: Brotein Crew with weekly leaderboard — Testing#1 + Testing#2
html:
Brotein Crew tab populated — 1/25 connected (@brotein_titan451), Weekly Leaderboard showing Testing#1 (192g) and Testing#2 (0g) ranked. The gamified social layer is rendering with real test data on Aug 31.

TL;DR

  • Brotein's Crew feature is shipping — gym-bro auto-handles like brotein_titan451 / brotein_wolf704 and gram-based weekly leaderboards.
  • Cap stays at 25 crew members per user — small enough to feel like an actual squad, not a feed.
  • Leaderboard ranks by total grams of protein logged that week — directly hooks into the protein logs table.

brotein · brotein crew feature · brotein data model · gamification leaderboard · anabolic scoring
